name: ai-governance-legal-uk
description: UK AI governance legal workflows: use case triage against your registry, AI impact assessments across UK regulatory regimes (ICO AI guidance, UK GDPR / DPA 2018, CMA AI guidance, FCA AI requirements, Online Safety Act 2023, DSIT pro-innovation framework, EU AI Act for UK companies selling to the EU). Covers England & Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland, with EU AI Act cross-border obligations for UK companies with EU exposure.
